author: Ethan
name: QAT Int4 16L + Full SOTA Stack
blurb: Full PR #549 SOTA stack with 16 layers via int4 nibble-packing. Adds quantization-aware training (QAT): int4 STE fake-quant on CastedLinear weights fires when LR scale < 0.15, so the model hardens to int4 noise before export. Export uses GPTQ-lite int4 (nibble-packed, lzma), fitting 16 layers in 16MB.
